age_at_offence.source: She was 15 years old at the time.

age_at_sentencing.source: The 1st defendant of 317/2023, So, was 15 at the time of her arrest and is now 19 years old.

gender.source: She was 15 years old at the time.

household_composition.source: She was living with a friend from September 2021 and not at home.

criminal_records.source: In June 2018, she was given a police superintendent’s caution for the offences of common assault and theft. In November 2018, she was sentenced to 24 months’ probation for the offences of wounding with intent to do grievous bodily harm and criminal damage.

positive_habits_after_arrest.source: I have received a letter in mitigation and evidence of her further recent vocational training to set herself up in employment in the future.
I have received a letter in mitigation and evidence of her further recent vocational training to set herself up in employment in the future.

age_at_offence.source: The 2nd defendant of 317/2023, Lam, was 18 at the time of these offences and still is a student in a vocational education course.

gender.source: When questioned, he said he intended to go into those premises.

education_level.source: The 2nd defendant of 317/2023, Lam, was 18 at the time of these offences and still is a student in a vocational education course.

occupation.source: The 2nd defendant of 317/2023, Lam, was 18 at the time of these offences and still is a student in a vocational education course.

criminal_records.source: He had a clear record at the time of his arrest.

family_supports.source: I have received many mitigation letters from not only the defendant himself expressing remorse but his supportive father, uncle, aunt and social workers.

age_at_offence.source: Fu of 316/2023 was also 18 at the time of these offences.

gender.source: They seized the mobile with which he had communicated with So and a bunch of keys.

education_level.source: Fu was also still a student and I granted him bail to give him a chance to complete his HKDSE examinations

occupation.source: Fu was also still a student and I granted him bail to give him a chance to complete his HKDSE examinations

criminal_records.source: He too had a clear record at the time of his arrest.

family_supports.source: I have a letter from his mother who accepts he must bear responsibility for his mistakes.
